name: atelier
description: AI task/procedure/runtime layer for agentic workflows

interface.shortDescription: Atelier tools and trace capture for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Bundle the Atelier MCP transport, role skills, standalone custom agents, and trace capture for Codex. Atelier code instructions apply to the main session through AGENTS.md; atelier.code, atelier.explore, atelier.review, atelier.plan, atelier.execute, atelier.research, and atelier.solve are available as custom subagents.
defaultPrompt: Use AGENTS.md for code mode; the legacy atelier_code config alias is not required.
Spawn atelier.plan, atelier.explore, or atelier.review for focused analysis.
Spawn atelier.execute, atelier.solve, atelier.research, or atelier.code when appropriate.
